message:
feat(ffs-fuse): add readlink FUSE callback + complete read-only ops (bd-27a)

Add the missing readlink override to FrankenFuse so symlinks are
resolved correctly via FUSE.  With this change all read-only ext4
operations (getattr, lookup, readdir, open, opendir, read, readlink)
are wired through FsOps.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
